home.title: Vuthy & Somphors
home.subtitle: The cutest little cheese shop in town! Handcrafted goodness made with love, smiles, and the finest ingredients.
home.seo_description: Welcome to Vuthy & Somphors - your destination for handcrafted fresh cheese, yogurts, and premium Italian delicacies in Siem Reap.

price_list.title: Price List
price_list.subtitle: Fresh handcrafted Italian foods and delicacies. Prices updated as of July 11, 2024.
price_list.no_items: No items found matching your search.
price_list.bulk_order: Bulk order? Contact us for special merchant pricing.
price_list.seo_description: Explore our artisan Italian food price list. From fresh Burrata and Mozzarella to gourmet meats and yogurts, find all our handcrafted delicacies and prices.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: We'd love to hear from you! Reach out to us through any of these channels.
contact.seo_description: Get in touch with Vuthy & Somphors in Siem Reap. Find our location, phone number, and Telegram for inquiries and fresh handcrafted food orders.
